rawFiles.name: ../data-geography/data/localities.json
rawFiles.notes: Local canonical OpenSyria geography locality file used for exact and reviewed near-name matches.

transforms: Matched border crossing records to OpenSyria geography localities only when the crossing name had an exact or obvious nearby spelling match.
Copied locality parent IDs and locality names into administrativeLocation.
Added source references to the matched OpenSyria geography locality IDs.
Did not synthesize Arabic facility names from locality names.
reviewNotes: Added reviewed OpenSyria geography administrative links to 17 border crossing records. Held 13 border crossing records without a safe exact or obvious locality match: sy-al-abbudiyah-border-crossing, sy-ash-shaykh-jabir-border-crossing, sy-at-tanf-border-crossing, sy-cizre-border-crossing, sy-gladeh-border-crossing, sy-hacipasa-border-crossing, sy-harem-border-crossing, sy-peshakapor-border-crossing, sy-riblah-border-crossing, sy-sahela-border-crossing, sy-sama-al-sarhan-border-crossing, sy-tall-kujik-border-crossing, sy-wadi-shallalah-border-crossing.
